query:
-- Get the admin user ID
SET @admin_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE openId = 'ethanmitchell3077' LIMIT 1);

-- Get a few product IDs for demo orders
SET @prod1 = (SELECT id FROM products LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0);
SET @prod2 = (SELECT id FROM products LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1);
SET @prod3 = (SELECT id FROM products LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2);

-- Create demo orders
INSERT INTO orders (orderNumber, userId, status, subtotalUSD, discountUSD, totalUSD, currency, totalInCurrency, exchangeRateSnapshot, paymentMethod, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  ('BLX-2026-0001', @admin_id, 'fulfilled', '12.99', '0.00', '12.99', 'USD', '12.99', '1.000000', 'paystack', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 DAY), DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 DAY)),
  ('BLX-2026-0002', @admin_id, 'fulfilled', '24.50', '2.00', '22.50', 'USD', '22.50', '1.000000', 'paystack', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY), DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)),
  ('BLX-2026-0003', @admin_id, 'processing', '8.99', '0.00', '8.99', 'USD', '8.99', '1.000000', 'wallet', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)),
  ('BLX-2026-0004', @admin_id, 'pending_payment', '15.00', '0.00', '15.00', 'NGN', '22500.00', '1500.000000', 'monnify', NOW(), NOW());

-- Create demo order items
INSERT INTO order_items (orderId, productId, productTitle, quantity, unitPriceUSD, totalUSD, status, createdAt)
SELECT o.id, @prod1, 'Facebook Aged Account - 2018', 1, '12.99', '12.99', 'delivered', o.createdAt
FROM orders o WHERE o.orderNumber = 'BLX-2026-0001';

INSERT INTO order_items (orderId, productId, productTitle, quantity, unitPriceUSD, totalUSD, status, createdAt)
SELECT o.id, @prod2, 'Gmail Account - Verified', 2, '11.25', '22.50', 'delivered', o.createdAt
FROM orders o WHERE o.orderNumber = 'BLX-2026-0002';

INSERT INTO order_items (orderId, productId, productTitle, quantity, unitPriceUSD, totalUSD, status, createdAt)
SELECT o.id, @prod3, 'Instagram Account - 500 Followers', 1, '8.99', '8.99', 'pending', o.createdAt
FROM orders o WHERE o.orderNumber = 'BLX-2026-0003';

-- Create wallet for admin user
INSERT INTO wallets (userId, balanceUSD, totalDepositedUSD, totalSpentUSD, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (@admin_id, '47.50', '100.00', '52.50', NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE balanceUSD = '47.50', totalDepositedUSD = '100.00', totalSpentUSD = '52.50';

SET @wallet_id = (SELECT id FROM wallets WHERE userId = @admin_id LIMIT 1);

-- Create demo wallet transactions
INSERT INTO wallet_transactions (userId, type, amountUSD, balanceAfterUSD, description, reference, status, gateway, createdAt)
VALUES
  (@admin_id, 'deposit', '50.00', '50.00', 'Wallet top-up via Paystack', 'PAY_REF_001', 'completed', 'paystack', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 DAY)),
  (@admin_id, 'deposit', '50.00', '100.00', 'Wallet top-up via Paystack', 'PAY_REF_002', 'completed', 'paystack', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)),
  (@admin_id, 'spend', '12.99', '87.01', 'Order #BLX-2026-0001 payment', 'ORD_001', 'completed', 'wallet', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 DAY)),
  (@admin_id, 'spend', '22.50', '64.51', 'Order #BLX-2026-0002 payment', 'ORD_002', 'completed', 'wallet', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)),
  (@admin_id, 'refund', '8.99', '73.50', 'Refund for Order #BLX-2026-0003', 'REF_001', 'completed', 'wallet', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)),
  (@admin_id, 'spend', '8.99', '64.51', 'Order #BLX-2026-0003 payment', 'ORD_003', 'completed', 'wallet', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)),
  (@admin_id, 'adjustment', '17.01', '47.50', 'Balance adjustment by admin', 'ADJ_001', 'completed', 'manual', NOW());

-- Create demo support tickets
INSERT INTO support_tickets (userId, subject, category, priority, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  (@admin_id, 'Order BLX-2026-0001 - Account not working', 'order', 'high', 'open', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 4 DAY), DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 4 DAY)),
  (@admin_id, 'Request refund for duplicate order', 'refund', 'medium', 'pending', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY), DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)),
  (@admin_id, 'How do I top up my wallet?', 'general', 'low', 'resolved', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 8 DAY), DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY));

-- Add ticket messages
INSERT INTO ticket_messages (ticketId, senderId, senderRole, message, createdAt)
SELECT t.id, @admin_id, 'user', 'I purchased an account but it is not working. Please help me resolve this.', t.createdAt
FROM support_tickets t WHERE t.subject = 'Order BLX-2026-0001 - Account not working' LIMIT 1;

  (@admin_id, 'adjustment', '17.01', '47.50', 'Balance adjustment by admin', 'ADJ_001', 'completed', 'manual', NOW());

-- Create demo support tickets
INSERT INTO support_tickets (userId, subject, category, priority, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  (@admin_id, 'Order BLX-2026-0001 - Account not working', 'order', 'high', 'open', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 4 DAY), DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 4 DAY)),
